message:
style: apply clippy and rustfmt fixes across testkit, sandbox, and protocol crates

Purely mechanical formatting and lint changes with no behavioral impact:

Testkit tests (5 files):
- cancellation_race.rs: reformat long assert messages, collapse single-
  expression async blocks
- deadline_monotonicity.rs: checked_sub replaces manual if/else abs diff,
  (3..=7).contains() replaces manual range check, Instant checked_sub
- differential_regression.rs: backtick-wrap type names in doc comments,
  abs_diff() replaces manual diff, () in select! arms for explicitness
- logging_contract.rs: collapse single-argument asserts, doc comment fixes
- parity_performance.rs: tick_count typed as u32, saturating_sub for Duration

Sandbox (2 files):
- egress.rs: map_or(ip, IpAddr::V4) replaces if-let-else pattern
- sandbox.rs: strip_prefix().map_or_else() replaces if/else-if chain

Whitespace-only (4 files): trailing whitespace removed in fcps.rs,
wasi.rs, offline.rs, provider.rs, client.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
